name: High-Speed WiFi
description: 200 Mbps unlimited optical fiber internet in all rooms and common areas.

name: Air Conditioning
description: Energy-efficient split ACs in all rooms with remote control.

description: 4 delicious veg/non-veg meals prepared daily in our clean kitchens.

description: Round-the-clock power backup via heavy-duty generators.
